message:
test(fj-conformance): add 20 oracle tests for BroadcastInDim primitive

Comprehensive coverage of lax.broadcast_in_dim behavior:
- Scalar broadcast: to 1D/2D/3D targets
- 1D to 2D: trailing axis, leading axis, default mapping
- Size-1 dimension broadcasting: row/column/both
- 1D to 3D: first axis, last axis mapping
- 2D to 3D: trailing default, explicit axis mapping
- Identity broadcast (same shape)
- Float tensor support
- Edge cases: single element, negative values, large expansion

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
